I was always someone who over-indulged, drinking on a night out and eating takeaways. I'm a 47-year-old mum from Hertfordshire, but I'm only now learning food was tied to my emotions - if I was happy, I celebrated with it; if I was unhappy, I overindulged. I have a high-level career as a talent and workforce transformation leader and tried all the typical diets, like low-fat plans and calorie-counting, but nothing worked. By January 2025, I was dangerously overweight for my height - at 5ft, I weighed 14 stone and was a size 18.

The Duchess of Sussex , 44, looked typically stylish in a $1,250 navy dress from local designer Karen Gee, which she paired with Dior's $1,000 'Dioressence' pointed-toe pumps. She debuted the chic heels in 2023. Adding a touch of glitz to her ensemble while at McAuley homeless centre in the city's inner-west, Meghan sported a yellow gold Puffy Heart earrings by Australian Real Fine Studio, costing $1,118 and a Tiffany gold bracelet. She completed her dazzling look with a gold Cartier Tank Française watch, thought to have belonged to Prince Harry's mother, the late Princess Diana. Meghan - who wore a smattering of glamorous makeup and kept her locks in a slicked ponytail - protected her designer outfit with a striped apron as she was photographed serving food to residents during her solo outing to the shelter.

You were not born when it started Bandera had met with officials of the British Secret Intelligence Service (known as MI6), in the British zone at the end of the war. MI6 regarded Bandera as potentially useful for Cold War purposes, and therefore decided to help him. MI6 had trained Bandera’s agents in Munich and London and had parachuted them into western Ukraine since 1949. At a course in April 1951, Bandera taught the recruits that Britain and the United States would soon attack the Soviet Union and help Ukraine gain independence. In a letter in 1951 to the leadership of the OUN in Ukraine, Bandera argued that the Western countries were preparing themselves for a war against the Soviet Union and needed two more years to produce enough weapons to begin one.

  • Tough love is not the vibe I would offer children of divorced parents, no matter their age. The break-up of a family is usually devastating and the children have no control in situations like these. Telling them that they can overcome adversity is one thing - telling them during this time of turmoil that "things will change as nothing is set in stone" is the most destabilizing mantra I can possibly think of. Your love for them doesn't change. His love for them doesn't change. The fact that they'll both always be there for their children won't change. That's what you tell them.

A police probe into the mysterious death of a Hungarian reality TV star has taken a new twist after a shepherd found the influencer's rucksack on Gran Canaria. Detectives identified Annabella Lovas, 32, using dental records after her half-naked body was discovered in a ravine on the island. The bag, containing her passport and personal belongings, was found in the south of Gran Canaria around a 15-minute drive inland from the tourist resort of Maspalomas.

The blue inhaler in the photo is NOT prednisolone it contains a completely different drug Salbutamol aka Ventolin inhaler. It is not a steroid and is a life-saving drug that is safe for asthmatics to use and is life saving if there is an attack or breathing difficulties. Please please get these photographs right this is not the first time you have illustrated a steroid scare article with the wrong and more widely used inhaler.

Prednisolone is a corticosteroid that relieves breathlessness by reducing inflammation in the airways. But long-term use can increase the risk of osteoporosis.

Little Miss Sunshine made a household name out of then ten-year old Abigail Breslin. The actress was catapulted into the limelight as Olive Hoover in the 2006 film which follows the story of her family travelling across the country when she wants to participate in a beauty pageant. She has since established herself as a popular actress through roles in the Zombieland film series, August: Osage County, and satirical horror series Scream Queens.

This is a diabolical area of Gloucester! I’m horrified at how high the price is and it’s nothing to do with previous street residents!

The three-storey townhouse on a quiet street in Gloucester appears very unassuming from the outside. It features eight bedrooms, two kitchens and three showers as well as a small garden out the back with off-road parking. On the market for just £375,000, after £50,000 was shaved off the guide price, any buyer has the potential to turn a profit should they decide to convert the 1,394 sq ft house into flats. However, there is a reason why the house is on sale for such a bargain.

Im sure the guy knew exactly how to do a flyover perfectly, need to chill and enjoy

A passenger jet pilot sparked fury in Iceland after flying a Boeing 757 at an 'alarmingly low' altitude above his hometown to celebrate his retirement. The pilot had been carrying out his final commercial flight after 40 years in service over Vestmannaeyjar, a volcanic archipelago off southern Iceland, on Saturday. Residents of the small island and passengers on board the flight from Frankfurt to Iceland were left startled when the pilot descended to just 100m over the community before landing at Keflavik International Airport.

  • As one of the so called " more mature fans" I was there at Anfield on Wednesday March 16th 1977, when we beat St Etienne in one of THE greatest ever matches staged at Anfield. 49 years since that night and I can still remember it like it was yesterday. St Etienne fans flooding into Liverpool city centre at lunch time in their thousands. Gates shut 90 minutes before kick off ! Keegan scored inside 72 seconds. Ray Clemence makes wonder saves to repel the brilliant Dominique Rocheteau. Dominique Bathenay equalises with a fantastic 51st minute thunderbolt equaliser. Ray Kennedy scores to give us hope. Less than six minutes left and Fairclough runs to the Kop end and buries the winner ! Complete, utter unforgettable mayhem and bedlam. The last five minutes is a wall of incredible sound. I was totally dazed on my four mile journey home ! Anything, just anything is possible at Anfield !
